html:
Exclusive to:  

The Rain Hat is a craftable Dress item from the Reign of Giants DLC. It requires 2 Moleworms, 1 Straw Hat, and 1 Bone Shard to craft and an Alchemy Engine to prototype. The Sewing Kit repairs 50% of its durability.

When worn during Rain, it protects against Wetness gain by 70%. Additionally, it insulates the player against Lightning strikes and the electric shocks of a charged Volt Goat.

Trivia

  • Rain Hats require Moleworms to craft because the moleskin is known for its water-resistance.
  • The crafting recipe used to require Tentacle Spots instead of Moleworms.
  • Wearing this hat while standing under Tree provides sufficient Wetness protection from rain.

Gallery

  • Rain Hat Equipped
  • The Rain Hat as seen in the Hook, Line, and Inker trailer.
  • Wilson with a Rain Hat in Reign of Giants spring promo poster
  • Wilson wearing a Rain Hat.
  • Willow wearing a Rain Hat.

  • Webber wearing a Rain Hat.
  • Walani wearing a Rain Hat.

  • Wilbur wearing a Rain Hat.

  • Wormwood wearing a Rain Hat.

  • Wurt wearing a Rain Hat.

"rainhat"
“It'll mess up my hair, but I'll stay nice and dry.”
–Wilson
“Anything to keep the water away.”
–Willow
“Is like water off mole's back.”
–Wolfgang
“What fun is rain if you're not getting wet?”
–Wendy
“INSULATED PROTECTION FROM WATER DAMAGE”
–WX-78
“I hate when my bun gets wet.”
–Wickerbottom
“Always keep a dry head while chopping.”
–Woodie
“Not the most dapper of hats, but quite necessary.”
–Maxwell
“Excellent apparel for traversing rainy weather.”
–Wagstaff
“We will fight in the rain.”
–Wigfrid
“It'll keep the water out of our fur.”
–Webber
“High and dry.”
–Walani
“Better than a newspaper.”
–Warly
“Keeps yer head dry.”
–Woodlegs
“WILBA STAY'TH DRY”
–Wilba
“Looks good?”
–Wormwood
“Keeps my noggin nice and dry.”
–Wheeler
“Dry as a daisy. That's the phrase, right?”
–Winona
“Splish and splash!”
–Wortox
“Rain not scary!”
–Wurt
“I wonder if I could make one for Woby too.”
–Walter
“What a charming rain bonnet!”
–Wanda
The Rain Hat is a craftable Dress item from the Reign of Giants DLC. It requires 2 Moleworms, 1 Straw Hat, and 1 Bone Shard to craft and an Alchemy Engine to prototype. The Sewing Kit repairs 50% of its durability.
When worn during Rain, it protects against Wetness gain by 70%. Additionally, it insulates the player against Lightning strikes and the electric shocks of a charged Volt Goat.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
Rain Hats require Moleworms to craft because the moleskin is known for its water-resistance.
The crafting recipe used to require Tentacle Spots instead of Moleworms.
Wearing this hat while standing under Tree provides sufficient Wetness protection from rain.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Mũ Mưa là một Trang Phục có thể chế tạo được từ DLC Reign of Giants. Nó cần 2 Giun Chũi, 1 Mũ Rơm và 1 Mảnh Xương để chế tạo và Máy Luyện Kim để tạo nguyên mẫu. Bộ May vá sửa chữa 50% độ bền của nó.

The '''Rain Hat''' is a craftable [[Dress]] item from the ''[[Don't Starve: Reign of Giants|Reign of Giants]]'' DLC. It requires 2 [[Moleworm]]s, 1 [[Straw Hat]], and 1 [[Bone Shards|Bone Shard]] to craft and an [[Alchemy Engine]] to prototype. The [[Sewing Kit]] repairs 50% of its durability.

When worn during [[Rain]], it protects against [[Wetness]] gain by 70%. Additionally, it insulates the player against [[Lightning]] strikes and the electric shocks of a charged [[Volt Goat]].

== {{Pic32|Placeholder}} Trivia ==
* Rain Hats require [[Moleworm]]s to craft because the moleskin is known for its water-resistance.
* The crafting recipe used to require [[Tentacle Spot]]s instead of Moleworms.
* Wearing this hat while standing under [[Tree]] provides sufficient Wetness protection from rain.
